summary: Dashboard weather shows a 7-day forecast, public holidays support two countries on their own row, and clipboard history keeps a full week of captures.

introduced: Weather panel includes a scrollable 7-day forecast strip below today's conditions
Choose up to two public holiday countries in Settings — each country gets its own column on a dedicated dashboard row
Public holiday icons use distinct accent colors per holiday instead of a single orange tone
changed: Public holidays moved to a separate collapsible row below Weather & sync
Clipboard history keeps all captures from the last 7 days with no 200-item cap — older non-pinned clips purge automatically
⇧⌘V reuse tracking also retains the last 7 days of paste-from-history events
